title: RPG Skill Trees
description: This mod adds 3 skill trees, an Arcanist, a Rogue and a Paladin, each one with his attributes and focus gameplay style!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f58dc6f0b5b08501113e5e21945fb1a0119d9d7f.gif)

Greetings!


This simple mod adds a Big skill tree, with 5 paths to follow. An Arcanist, a Rogue and a Paladin, an adventurer, and a ranger, each one with his attributes and focus gameplay style!


Gain more hearts, better damage, more powerful magic, life steal, overheal, sprint speed, stealth and more!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
Dependencies:

Apothic Attributes **(only in curseforge)**

Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks

Pufferfish's Skills

Pufferfish's Unofficial Additions

(and them dependencies)    

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

These skills trees are used in my modpack [Mythic Oddisey](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mythic-odissey) since the rework update! 
 

(The rework is only available for 1.20.1 for now, in a close future, will be available for 1.21.1)

 
Enjoy

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Credits:

 

Most of the Work goes to Pufferfish for the incredible base mod of this: Pufferfish's Skills

and thanks to iron431 for his amazing mod and base for this too: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks

and for Shadows_of_fire for his mod Aphotic Attributes, which were indispensable for the creation of this mod


 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 
Future plans: 

 

New Tree System (completed)

2 New classes (completed)

1.21.1 rework version
